blocks.text: Bernabéu night — Bayern and Arsenal open Europe's quarterfinals

Arsenal arrive in Lisbon top of the Premier League, 9 points clear of City. Arteta's men are hunting their first major — TV2 this morning: "Gi meg én av dem." An away goal tonight could be everything.
♟️ 14:30 — FIDE Candidates Round 8, Cyprus. Halfway point passed — the leaderboard is beginning to separate contenders from the field.

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday — CL quarterfinals continue
items: Barcelona vs Atlético Madrid — Camp Nou, 21:00 [★5]
Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool — Parc des Princes, 21:00 [★5]

blocks.text: ⛳ Thu — Masters Tournament tees off at Augusta. Hovland and Reitan chase the green jacket.
